caption: A man with a tall, grey-haired wig and glasses sits in a recording studio, wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, and gold suspenders. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him, gesturing with his right hand. In the background, a woman with red hair is partially visible, and a sign reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." A framed picture of a yellow shield hangs on the wall. The on-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "#REALTALK PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "REAL TALK 101." As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak and move his hand, his mouth opening and closing as he talks. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man against the studio backdrop.
